{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142558506B293E47B410EF10EE"}"},"total":3236},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7440422616903844633","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得一看，熟悉的笔法，熟悉的味道。我是认真记笔记地看。骚话有，干货也有。有种道法自然的通透感。防止内耗，心情舒畅。","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":54,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177424715810EF10EE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227440422616903844633%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227438876347578993689%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732361791,"group_id":"7438876347578993689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6VzS+TkNchGI35cPUvYzjWnK6XgyZMx2IsJXOPbuPgq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1649693769859774","user_name":"优柔寡断的怪兽胶囊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1649693769859774","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438876347578993689","book_info":{"abstract":"“叶伯常，我是这么想的，我爸妈年纪大了，这趟来了，就让他们留下来吧。”
“就住三环人居那套吧，一百六十个平方，姐姐，姐夫过来看他们也可以住。”
“你为什么不说话？我爸妈不配住你的房子吗？”
女人拉扯叶伯常的方向盘，车祸发生时，时光重回2004年，那天距叶伯常的父亲去世没几天，精神分裂症的老妈还在做着那个高音歌唱家的梦。
不当人的娘舅还在打着强占叶伯常他爸留下的房产与钱的主意。
设计院投标失败的黑锅同时砸在叶伯常的头上。
好不容易才走出原生家庭，才刚结束精神内耗的叶伯常再次面对财狼虎豹。
叶伯常知道，人命才是最公平的，能争取多少，就看自己够不够狠。
我本善良，奈何身旁全是魑魅魍魉！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b934d6a987b1e52adde379bb32700dec","author":"猪的理想大","author_id":"","book_id":"7438876347578993689","book_name":"疯妈隔离后，人生开挂","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438876468459160089","read_count":"24067","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2092554"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1000","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,家庭,职场","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od14a25b213b32b31b227a5450ca400cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431158&x-signature=Z0gDzK1hXZS2hNaq9JD4Qx6KR40%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2850390321929774","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142558506B293E47B410EF10EE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":51,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3811,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":110255},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537969085188440894","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"突然改书名了，叶伯常重生后乐观的心态，积极向上的生活态度，值得我们学习，每个人的家庭各有不同，生活工作的不如意，归咎于原生家庭！看视频案例听见解，听心灵鸡汤专家解读，自媒体公知刻意引导对立情绪，很多人遇到家庭矛盾，纠结在亲情爱情伦理是非观念，选择一方失去另一方，有看到结果有看到过程，在道德制高点上批判你，诺是你又当如何抉择，他（她）不在其中，不知酸甜苦辣，让子弹飞一会，云开雾散谁在其中！
“且停且忘且随风，且行且看且从容。”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755074664,"group_id":"7438876347578993689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3mxMugVIxAutaKB46oXWis=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"97090108518","user_name":"中元域的布拉特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97090108518","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438876347578993689","book_info":{"abstract":"“叶伯常，我是这么想的，我爸妈年纪大了，这趟来了，就让他们留下来吧。”
